title: Miscellaneous Metals (Formerly Marbled's Core)
description: A mod that adds Steel/Titanium materials for Marbled's Mods, but can be used standalone too
body:
[![BH Partner](https://i.postimg.cc/cJwynrYz/mhs-partnerbanner.png)](https://bisecthosting.com/marbledhubb?r=Modrinth)

## **Marbled's Core** 
Marbled's Core is a core mod for [Forge](https://files.minecraftforge.net/net/minecraftforge/forge/) 1.16.5, 1.19.2, and 1.20.1. Required by some of my (MarbledNull's) mods, though this mod can be used as a standalone mod as it has its own features like Steel/Titanium armor sets, tools, items, and decorative blocks.

![Marbled's Core Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/723c7eed1e676779ae39e327f460d2583dde76da.png)

## **Features**

- Steel items such as Ingots, Nuggets, Sheets, and more.
- ~~Decorative Steel blocks.~~ Coming in 1.1.0
- Steel armor sets and tool sets.
- Titanium items such as Ingots, Nuggets, Sheets, and more.
- ~~Decorative Titanium blocks.~~ Coming in 1.1.0
- Titanium armor sets and tool sets.
- Compatibility. Compatible with the Create mod to create Steel/Titanium sheets! Also the ingots uses the Forge:ingots/ tag, offering more compatiblity with other mods.

## **Installation**

This mod requires Forge 1.20.1.

## **Usage**

- You may use this in your modpacks, no credit required but it would be apprecated.
- You may use this in your video, no credit required but it would be appreciated.
- You may NOT re-distribute this mod or its assets ANYWHERE. 

MarbledHubb Studios is proudly partnered with [BisectHosting!](https://bisecthosting.com/marbledhubb?r=Modrinth) When using our code "marbledhubb", you are saving 25% off any gaming server while supporting us by commission, supporting the development of our projects!
